question.label: Self-read opener
question.name: Before I share my view, how do you think the last stretch has gone?
question.description: Anchors the conversation in their self-assessment first; gap vs manager's view becomes a signal.

answer: I think my technical output is solid, but my influence is uneven.

assessment.note: She gave a clear self-assessment and named a specific concern — uneven influence — while staying engaged with the performance question.

new_queue.label: Uneven influence
new_queue.name: You said 'influence is uneven' — where has that shown up most clearly?

new_queue.label: What they're proud of
new_queue.name: What's something from the last quarter you're genuinely proud of — not what looks good, what actually was good?

new_queue.label: Stakeholder signal
new_queue.name: Where did your recent work get the clearest traction with stakeholders?

new_queue.label: Gap awareness
new_queue.name: Where do you think you've fallen short of where you want to be?

new_queue.label: Signal driver
new_queue.name: What's making it harder to raise your signal with stakeholders right now?

new_queue.label: Alignment move
new_queue.name: What's the first concrete move you want to make on cross-team alignment before we next meet?

history.answer_excerpt: I think my technical output is solid, but my influence is uneven.
I think my technical output is solid, but my influence is uneven.
